whats the difference between base damage and damage amplification?

Base damage is the characters damage without any modifiers apart from base damage increases. This is stuff like helot catena rouse, kath flame damage scaling. You can also find it on wheels. Damage amplification is generally more common/easier to get and is multiplicative with base damage. This is why damage amp is considered "good" on character with base damage scaling and kind of meh everywhere else.
